chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1840 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 7286/25 2.For orders on objections 3.For orders on CMA 7287/25 4.For orders on CMA 7288/25 5.For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Ms Farzana (Bhatti) Makwal, Advocate along with both petitioners. **** On being confronted about the maintainability of this petition on the ground that the FIR, for which instant petition has been filed seeking its quashment, has been registered in the Province of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that for redressal of their grievances, the petitioners will approach the proper forum. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
